text:
8-year-old from China is writing Python and automating a YouTube system that makes $10,000 a month.

Game loop, replay function, player markers - found the bug himself, explained the logic out loud, fixed the line through a projector on the entire wall. 

That same code in a year https://t.co/4eoggOKD2V https://t.co/jnIXiNGrMi
